title: New Partner Onboarding
description: A first training path for new Partners learning the OS structure, Partner lanes, safe language, and launch workflow.
modules: Understand Partner as the umbrella term.
Review resource categories and launch kits.
Learn approved and restricted funding language.
Choose the first Partner action rhythm.
firstAction: Read the Start Here page and review the compliance page before outreach.
completionOutcome: The Partner understands the OS structure, where to find resources, and how to avoid unsafe funding claims.

title: Responsible Funding Language
description: A training path for using safe funding language in scripts, handouts, emails, launch kits, and Partner conversations.
firstAction: Open the compliance page and read the default disclaimer.
completionOutcome: The Partner can identify unsafe claims and rewrite them using approved language.

title: Referral Partner Outreach
description: A training path for approaching bank managers, accountants, attorneys, equipment dealers, trucking contacts, construction contacts, and local connectors.
modules: Review what conversations created useful next actions.
firstAction: Choose one referral lane and review its safe positioning.
completionOutcome: The Partner can approach referral sources with a clear, respectful, compliance-safe message.

title: Business Funding Conversation Basics
description: A training path for business owner discovery conversations and safe next-step framing.
modules: Ask about use of funds and timing.
firstAction: Review the Business Funding Conversation Script.
completionOutcome: The Partner can hold a discovery conversation that frames possible funding paths without guarantees.

title: CRM and Tracking Rhythm
description: A training path for using lightweight trackers to manage Partner actions, conversations, assets, and follow-up.
firstAction: Start a Daily 5 Tracker entry for the current day.
completionOutcome: The Partner can track activity and follow-up without overcomplicating the process.

title: Follow-Up Discipline
description: A training path for turning conversations into clear next actions and review cycles.
modules: Identify the next action after each conversation.
Close the loop with referral sources where appropriate.
firstAction: Review open conversations and assign a next action to each one.
completionOutcome: The Partner can manage follow-up with more consistency and less operational fog.

title: Darwin Hanneman Launch Kit Training
description: A prototype training path for using Darwin Hanneman’s launch kit as the model for future Partner pages.
modules: Review accountant, attorney, equipment, trucking, and construction strategies.
Use the 30-day launch rhythm as a planning model.
firstAction: Open the Darwin Hanneman launch kit page.
completionOutcome: The Partner or operator understands how the prototype launch kit structure should be cloned and adapted.

title: Prompt Workflow Training
description: A training path for using prompts to draft launch kits, scripts, referral assets, compliance rewrites, and status updates.
modules: Save only reviewed outputs to the proper source path.
firstAction: Review the Prompt Library Starter Pack.
completionOutcome: The Partner or operator can use prompts to create useful drafts while preserving compliance review discipline.

title: Tool and Tracker Training
description: A training path for using worksheets, trackers, scorecards, and future tools without implying guaranteed outcomes.
modules: Use trackers for follow-up and review.
Avoid overbuilding before the workflow is proven.
Treat tool outputs as planning support.
Review any funding-related language before publishing.
firstAction: Open the Tools page and choose one worksheet or tracker concept to use.
completionOutcome: The Partner or operator can use tools and trackers to organize work without treating them as outcome predictors.
